title: CT3.N15 completed discharge record — Lemma — type-data persistence
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT3.N15, the assertion node “Lemma — type-data persistence” of tactic CT3 (External-type compression). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT3.N15. It must be exactly `CT3`, selecting External-type compression (external type) as the tactic that owns the assertion step “Lemma — type-data persistence” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Lemma — type-data persistence”. It must be exactly `CT3.N15` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT3.N15 within tactic CT3 (External-type compression). It must be exactly 15, matching the N15 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT3.N15. It must be exactly `proved`, meaning that the node's mathematical assertion or construction has been established for the assertion obligation “Lemma — type-data persistence”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT3.N15. The array must contain `S-Prove`, `S-Pers`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Lemma — type-data persistence”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Prove` to occur in CT3.N15's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that records the proposition, its assumptions, and proof evidence for the obligation “Lemma — type-data persistence”.

Requires `S-Pers` to occur in CT3.N15's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that proves that the named assertion persists across the recorded state transition for the obligation “Lemma — type-data persistence”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT3.N15 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Prove (proposition, assumptions, evidence); S-Pers (fromStateRef, toStateRef, preserved, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Prove` evidence instance at CT3.N15. It must be exactly `S-Prove`, identifying the contract that records the proposition, its assumptions, and proof evidence; the same instance must supply proposition, assumptions, evidence.

Contract discriminator for a `S-Pers` evidence instance at CT3.N15. It must be exactly `S-Pers`, identifying the contract that proves that the named assertion persists across the recorded state transition; the same instance must supply fromStateRef, toStateRef, preserved, evidence.

statement.informal: Prove or verify: Lemma — type-data persistence

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
